plugins.name: ai-media-setup
plugins.description: Wire kie.ai (unified AI media API) into your project — API key in .env, model selection, sanity test call. Use when starting AI media work, setting up Veo 3 / Nano Banana / Flux / ElevenLabs integrations.

plugins.name: ai-media-video
plugins.description: Generate video via Veo 3 (or other video models via kie.ai). Handles prompt-to-script-to-clip, variations, aspect ratios. Use when the user wants to create video ads, product demos, social clips, or marketing video.

plugins.name: ai-media-image
plugins.description: Generate images via Nano Banana / Flux / Imagen through kie.ai. Batch runs, brand-consistent prompts, variations. Use for product shots, marketing images, social graphics.

plugins.name: ai-media-voice
plugins.description: TTS and voice cloning via kie.ai voice models (ElevenLabs, etc). Use for voiceovers, audio ads, multi-lingual narration, podcast intro/outros.

plugins.name: ai-media-pipeline
plugins.description: End-to-end n8n workflow for AI media generation — trigger, generate, post-process, store, publish. Use when setting up automated content pipelines (daily social posts, weekly ads, on-demand creation).

plugins.name: ai-media-cost
plugins.description: Estimate cost of a batch AI media generation run before committing. Handles per-model pricing. Use before kicking off large batches to avoid overspending.
